---
title: Laura's review on AEM water electrolysis in Current Opinion in Electrochemistry
date: 2024-12-14
categories: [Publication]
---

Congratulations to Laura Titheridge on her <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.coelec.2024.101607" target="_blank">review</a> in Current Opinion in Electrochemistry covering anion exchange membrane (AEM) water electrolysis. The review provides a timely overview of the current status, challenges, and opportunities for AEM electrolysers as a lower-cost alternative to PEM technology for green hydrogen production. Well done Laura!
